title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 550.150 - Names of witnesses certified
text:
550.150.  Names of witnesses certified. — The clerk shall attach to each fee bill a certified copy of the names of all witnesses endorsed on the indictment or information and all orders of the prosecuting attorney and affidavits of the prosecutor as provided for in section 545.320, and no costs shall be paid any state witness not therein.
(RSMo 1939 § 4230) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3835; 1919 § 4178; 1909 § 5386
